translations.- Declare a ZNSTextAttachmentable object:
- Declare a ZNSTextAttachmentable object that encapsulates the NSTextStorage object (built-in to UITextView) and the UILabel itself (UILabel does not have NSTextStorage).  
  The operation method is only to implement replacing attributedString from NSRange. (`func replace(attachment: ZNSTextAttachment, to: ZResizableNSTextAttachment)`)

- The implementation first uses `ZNSTextAttachment` to wrap the imageURL, PlaceholderImage, and the display size information, then directly shows the image using the placeholder.

- When the system needs this image on the screen, it will call the `image(forBounds…)` method. At this point, we start downloading the Image Data.

- DataSource is exposed to allow external control over how to download or implement Image Cache Policy. By default, it uses URLSession to request image data directly.

- After downloading, create a new `ZResizableNSTextAttachment` and implement the logic for custom image size in `attachmentBounds(for…)`.

- Call the `replace(attachment: ZNSTextAttachment, to: ZResizableNSTextAttachment)` method to replace the position of `ZNSTextAttachment` with `ZResizableNSTextAttachment`.

- Send didLoad delegate notification to allow external integration when needed

- Completed
translations.- Error tolerance 0: `<br>` / `<Congratu:
- Error tolerance 0: `
` / `` / `BoldBold+ItalicItalic` These three possible HTML scenarios will cause XMLParser to throw an error and display blank when parsing. - Using XMLParser requires the HTML string to fully comply with XML rules, and it cannot display normally with fault tolerance like browsers or NSAttributedString.DocumentType.html.
translations.- HTML Tag without Close Tag: for exampl:
- HTML Tag without Close Tag: for example `
` - Plain text treated as HTML Tag: for example `` - HTML tag misalignment issue: for example `LinkBold`
translations.- Note 1 \n Using HTML as a communicat:
- Note 1  
  Using HTML as a communication and rendering medium between the app and data is not recommended. HTML specifications are too flexible, the app cannot support all HTML styles, and there is no official HTML conversion rendering engine.

- Note 2  
  Starting from iOS 14, you can use the native AttributedString to parse Markdown or integrate the apple/swift-markdown Swift Package to parse Markdown.

- Note 3  
  Due to the large scale of our projects and the long-term use of HTML as a medium, we are currently unable to fully switch to Markdown or other markup languages.

- **Note 4**  
  **The HTML here is not meant to display a full web page, but to use HTML as styled Markdown for rendering string styles.**  
  **(For rendering full pages or complex HTML with images and tables, you still need to use WebView loadHTML)**
translations.- Poor performance: This method renders:
- Poor performance: This method renders styles through the WebView Core, then switches back to the Main Thread for UI display; rendering over 300 characters takes about 0.03 seconds.

- Missing text: For example, marketing copy might use `<Congratulation!>`, which will be treated as an HTML tag and removed.

- Cannot customize: For example, it is not possible to specify the exact boldness level of HTML bold tags in NSAttributedString.

- [iOS ≥ 12 sporadic crashes issue with no official solution](https://developer.apple.com/forums/thread/115405){:target="_blank"}

- In iOS 15, there were [many crashes](../a8c2d26cc734/). Testing found that under low battery conditions, crashes occurred 100% of the time (fixed in iOS ≥ 15.2).

- Strings that are too long will cause a crash. Testing shows that inputting a string longer than 54,600+ characters will 100% crash (EXC_BAD_ACCESS).
translations.- Supports HTML Render (to NSAttributedS:
- Supports HTML Render (to NSAttributedString) / Stripper (remove HTML Tags) / Selector features

- Higher Performance Than `NSAttributedString.DocumentType.html`

- Automatic Analysis and Correction of Tag Accuracy (Fixing Tags Without End Tags & Misplaced Tags)

- Support dynamic style setting from `style="color:red…”`

- Support custom style specification, such as making bold text even **bolder**

- Support flexible and extensible tags or custom tags and attributes
translations.- The link style in UITextView is unifor:
- The link style in UITextView is uniformly controlled by the `linkTextAttributes` setting and does not consider NSAttributedString.Key configurations, nor does it allow individual style customization. This is why `ZMarkupParser.linkTextAttributes` is provided as an interface.

- UILabel currently has no way to change link styles, and since UILabel lacks TextStorage, loading NSTextAttachment images requires additional handling of UILabel.
translations.- The original Attributes data structure: - The original Attributes data structure is `[NSAttributedString.Key: Any?]`. If exposed directly, it is hard to control the values users input, and incorrect values may cause crashes, such as `.font: 123`. - Styles need to be inheritable. For example, in `test`, the style of the string "test" inherits from the link and is bold (bold + link). Directly exposing a Dictionary makes it difficult to properly manage inheritance rules. - Encapsulate iOS/macOS (UIKit/AppKit) related objects
translations.- `?:` allows () to match a group withou: - `?:` allows () to match a group without capturing the result e.g. `(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?example\.com` will return the entire URL in `https://www.example.com` instead of `https://` or `www` - `.+?` non-greedy match (returns the nearest match) e.g. `<.+?>` in `test` will return `` and `` instead of the whole string - `(?=XYZ)` any string until the substring `XYZ` appears; note that a similar pattern `[^XYZ]` means any character until `X or Y or Z` appears e.g. `(?:__)(.+?(?=__))(?:__)` (any string until `__`) will match `test` - `?R` recursively searches inward for the same pattern value e.g. `\((?:[^()]|((?R)))+\)` will match `(simple)`, `(and(nested))`, and `(nested)` in `(simple) (and(nested))` - `?` … `\k` matches the previous Group Name e.g. `(?).*(\k)` - `(?(X)yes|no)` matches the condition `yes` if the `X`th capture group (or Group Name) has a value; otherwise, it matches `no`. **Not supported in Swift yet**
translations.- respectMarkupStyleFromCode: \n Use t:
- respectMarkupStyleFromCode:  
  Use the default style first; then check which styles can be added from Style Attributes. If a value already exists, ignore it.

- respectMarkupStyleFromHTMLStyleAttribute:  
  Primarily consider the Style Attributes; then check what styles can be supplemented from the default styles, ignoring any values that already exist.
translations.1. Performance/algorithm optimization, a:
1. Performance/algorithm optimization: Although faster and more stable than the native `NSAttributedString.DocumentType.html`, there is still much room for improvement. I believe the performance will never match that of XMLParser; hopefully, one day it can achieve similar performance while maintaining customization and automatic error correction.

2. Support more HTML tags and style attribute conversion parsing.

3. [ZNSTextAttachment](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZNSTextAttachment){:target="_blank"} further optimized to support reuse and memory release; may need to study CoreText.

4. Support Markdown parsing because the underlying abstraction is not limited to HTML; as long as the Markdown is converted to Markup objects, Markdown parsing can be completed. Therefore, I named it ZMarkupParser instead of ZHTMLParser, hoping to support Markdown to NSAttributedString someday.

5. Support Any to Any, e.g. HTML to Markdown, Markdown to HTML. Since we have the original AST tree (Markup objects), it is possible to implement conversion between any Markup formats.

6. Implement CSS `!important` functionality to enhance the inheritance strategy of the abstract MarkupStyle.

7. Enhance the HTML Selector functionality; currently, it only has the most basic filter features.

8. So many, feel free to open an [issue](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser/issues){:target="_blank"}.

translations.[正则表达式是如何运作的？](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/: [How do regular expressions work?](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/i_C4ATnajxRDGlTA8dJDHg){:target="_blank"} -> **Can be referenced for future optimization of this project's regex performance**
translations.`(?(X)yes|no)` 第 `X` 個匹配結果有值(也可以用 Group:
`(?(X)yes|no)` matches the condition `yes` if the `X`th capture group (or Group Name) has a value; otherwise, it matches `no`.  
**Not supported in Swift yet**
translations.`(?=XYZ)` 任何字串直到 `XYZ` 字串出現；要注意，另一個與之相似的:
`(?=XYZ)` any string until the substring `XYZ` appears; note that a similar pattern `[^XYZ]` means any character until `X or Y or Z` appears  
e.g. `(?:__)(.+?(?=__))(?:__)` (any string until `__`) will match `test`
translations.`.+?` 非貪婪的匹配 (找到最近的就返回)\ne.g. `<.+?>` 在: `.+?` non-greedy match (returns the nearest match) e.g. `<.+?>` in `test` will return `` and `` instead of the whole string
translations.`?:` 可以讓 () 匹配 group 結果，但不會捕獲返回\ne.g. `(:
`?:` allows () to match a group without capturing the result  
e.g. `(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:www\.)?example\.com` will return the entire URL in `https://www.example.com` instead of `https://` or `www`
translations.`?<GroupName>` … `\\k<GroupName>` 匹配前面的:
`?<GroupName>` … `\k<GroupName>` matches the previous Group Name  
e.g. `(?<tagName><a>).*(\k<GroupName>)`
translations.`?R` 遞迴往內找一樣規則的值\ne.g. `\\((?:[^()]|((?R:
`?R` recursively searches inward for the same pattern value  
e.g. `\((?:[^()]|((?R)))+\)` will match `(simple)`, `(and(nested))`, and `(nested)` in `(simple) (and(nested))`

NSAttributedString(data: data, options: attributedOptions, documentAttributes: nil) ```
translations.```swift\npublic extension ZHTMLParserBu:
```swift
public extension ZHTMLParserBuilder {
    static var htmlTagNames: [HTMLTagName] {
        return [
            A_HTMLTagName(),
            B_HTMLTagName(),
            BR_HTMLTagName(),
            DIV_HTMLTagName(),
            HR_HTMLTagName(),
            I_HTMLTagName(),
            LI_HTMLTagName(),
            OL_HTMLTagName(),
            P_HTMLTagName(),
            SPAN_HTMLTagName(),
            STRONG_HTMLTagName(),
            U_HTMLTagName(),
            UL_HTMLTagName(),
            DEL_HTMLTagName(),
            TR_HTMLTagName(),
            TD_HTMLTagName(),
            TH_HTMLTagName(),
            TABLE_HTMLTagName(),
            IMG_HTMLTagName(handler: nil),
            // ...
        ]
    }
}

public extension ZHTMLParserBuilder {
    static var styleAttributes: [HTMLTagStyleAttribute] {
        return [
            ColorHTMLTagStyleAttribute(),
            BackgroundColorHTMLTagStyleAttribute(),
            FontSizeHTMLTagStyleAttribute(),
            FontWeightHTMLTagStyleAttribute(),
            LineHeightHTMLTagStyleAttribute(),
            WordSpacingHTMLTagStyleAttribute(),
            // ...
        ]
    }
}
```
translations.```yaml\ncomment: # thi:
```yaml
comment:                  # this is a top-level key
  layout: "reach, diff, flags, files"
  behavior: default
  require_changes: false  # if true: only post the comment if coverage changes
  require_base: no        # [yes :: must have a base report to post]
  require_head: yes       # [yes :: must have a head report to post]
```
translations.```yaml\nname: CI\n\non:\n workflow_dis:
```yaml
name: CI

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, reopened]
  push:
    branches:
    - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: spm build and test
        run: |
          set -o pipefail
          xcodebuild test -workspace ZMarkupParser.xcworkspace -testPlan ZMarkupParser -scheme ZMarkupParser -enableCodeCoverage YES -resultBundlePath './scripts/TestResult.xcresult' -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 14,OS=16.1' build test | xcpretty
      - name: Codecov
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3.1.1
        with:
          xcode: true
          xcode_archive_path: './scripts/TestResult.xcresult'
```
translations.init 的 value = attribute 的值，依照 visit 類型轉: The value of init is set to the attribute's value and converted to the corresponding MarkupStyle field according to the visit type.
translations.respectMarkupStyleFromCode:\n使用預設樣式為主；再看:
respectMarkupStyleFromCode:  
Use the default style first; then check which styles can be added from Style Attributes. If a value already exists, ignore it.
translations.respectMarkupStyleFromHTMLStyleAttribute:
respectMarkupStyleFromHTMLStyleAttribute:  
Primarily consider the Style Attributes; then check what styles can be supplemented from the default styles, ignoring any values that already exist.
translations.⚠️️️️️️ 本文會盡量簡化 Demo Code、減少抽象跟效能考量，盡量把重: ⚠️️️️️️ This article simplifies the demo code, reduces abstraction and performance considerations, and focuses on explaining the working principles; for the final results, please refer to the project [Source Code](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser){:target="_blank"}.
translations.一些這次新學習的 cheat sheet 筆記…\n\n: Some cheat sheet notes I learned this time…
translations.一般文字被當成 HTML Tag: 例如 `<Congratulation!>`: Plain text treated as HTML Tag: for example `<Congratulation!>`
translations.上一篇也只是探究出可以使用 XMLParser 解析 HTML 並做對應轉換，然: The previous article only explored using XMLParser to parse HTML and perform corresponding conversions, completing an experimental implementation. However, it was not designed as a well-structured and extensible "tool."
translations.上圖為大概的運作流程，後面文章會一步一步介紹及附上程式碼。\n\n: The above diagram shows the general workflow. The following sections will introduce each step with code examples.
translations.下載完成後 new 一個新的 `ZResizableNSTextAttachme: After downloading, create a new `ZResizableNSTextAttachment` and implement the logic for custom image size in `attachmentBounds(for…)`.
translations.不使用 `NSLayoutManager.invalidateLayout(fo: The reason for not using `NSLayoutManager.invalidateLayout(forCharacterRange: range, actualCharacterRange: nil)` or `NSLayoutManager.invalidateDisplay(forCharacterRange: range)` to refresh the UI is that the UI does not update correctly. Since the exact Range is known, directly replacing the NSAttributedString ensures the UI updates properly.
translations.並可透過 `width` / `height` HTML Attribute 指: You can specify the desired display size through the `width` / `height` HTML attributes.
translations.串接 [Codecov.io](https://about.codecov.io: Integrate with [Codecov.io](https://about.codecov.io){:target="_blank"} (free for Public Repos) to evaluate Test Coverage by simply installing the Codecov GitHub App and configuring it.
translations.主要功能邏輯都有 UnitTests 並加上整合測試，最終 [Test Cove: The main functional logic is covered by Unit Tests along with integration tests. The final [Test Coverage](https://app.codecov.io/gh/ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser){:target="_blank"} is around **85%**.
translations.主要是參考 [Asynchronous NSTextAttachments](h: Mainly based on the [Asynchronous NSTextAttachments](https://www.cocoanetics.com/2016/09/asynchronous-nstextattachment-1/){:target="_blank"} series of articles, but replaced the final update part (UI needs to refresh after download to display) and added Delegate/DataSource for external extension.
translations.也可將 Markup 宣告 `Hashable` ，直接使用 Dictionar: You can also declare Markup as `Hashable` and directly use a Dictionary to store values `[Markup: Any]`, but in this case, Markup cannot be used as a regular type and must be written as `any Markup`.
translations.介紹完 MarkupStyle 物件後，我們要從 Normalization 的: After introducing the MarkupStyle object, we will convert the Normalization result of HTMLElementComponents into MarkupStyle.
translations.以上兩個方案都不能完美優雅的解決 HTML 問題，於是開始搜尋有無現成的解決方案: Neither of the two solutions could perfectly and elegantly solve the HTML problem, so I started searching for existing solutions.
translations.以上就是我開發 ZMarkupParser 的所有技術細節及心路歷程，花費了我快: This concludes all the technical details and my journey in developing ZMarkupParser. It took me nearly three months of after-work and weekend time, countless research and practice, writing tests, improving test coverage, and setting up CI. Only then did I achieve a somewhat presentable result. I hope this tool can help those facing similar challenges, and I also hope everyone can work together to make this tool even better.
translations.但他可以給一些知識盲區的大方向，讓我們能快速大略知道某些地方應該會怎麼做；有的時: But it can provide a general direction for knowledge gaps, allowing us to quickly get a rough idea of how certain things should be done. Sometimes, when our understanding is too low, it's hard to quickly find the right direction on Google. In such cases, ChatGPT is quite helpful.
translations.使用 XMLParser，HTML 字串必須完全符合 XML 規則，無法像瀏覽器: Using XMLParser requires the HTML string to fully comply with XML rules, and it cannot display normally with fault tolerance like browsers or NSAttributedString.DocumentType.html.
translations.使用同前文解析方式，我們可以在 `visit(_ markup: ListIte: Using the same parsing method as before, we can obtain other list items and know the current list index in `visit(_ markup: ListItemMarkup)` (thanks to the conversion into an AST).
translations.使用純 Swift 開發，透過 Regex 剖析出 HTML Tag 並經過 T: Developed purely in Swift, it uses Regex to parse HTML tags and perform tokenization, analyzes and corrects tag accuracy (fixing tags without an end or misaligned tags), then converts them into an abstract syntax tree. Finally, it uses the Visitor Pattern to map HTML tags with abstract styles to produce the final NSAttributedString result—all without relying on any parser library.
translations.例如 HTML 可能會給： `<a style=”color:red;font-: For example, the HTML might be: `RedLink`, which means this link should be styled with red color and font size 14px.
translations.修正方式也很簡單，我們需要遍歷 Tokenization 結果的元素，嘗試補齊缺: The fix is also simple. We need to iterate through the elements in the Tokenization results and try to fill in the missing parts.
translations.其次問題是效能，因為做為字串樣式 Markup Language，會大量應用在: The second issue is performance. As a string style Markup Language, it is heavily used in UILabel/UITextView within apps. As mentioned earlier, a single label takes about 0.03 seconds, so multiplying this by multiple UILabels/UITextViews can cause noticeable lag in user interactions.
translations.再來我們要先完成將 HTML 轉換成 MarkupStyle (NSAttrib: Next, we need to complete the conversion from HTML to MarkupStyle (NSAttributedString.Key).
translations.再來才是本篇文章想分享的，關於開發這個工具上的技術細節。\n\n: Next is the technical detail about developing this tool that this article wants to share.
translations.再次重新探討此議題，我們需要能將 API 給的 HTML 字串轉換成 NSAtt: Revisiting this topic, we need to convert the HTML string provided by the API into an NSAttributedString and apply the corresponding styles to display it in a UITextView/UILabel.
translations.到此我們就完成了 HTML String to NSAttributedStri: At this point, we have completed the entire conversion process from HTML String to NSAttributedString.
translations.剝離 HTML Tag 的部分相對簡單，只需要:\n\n: Stripping HTML tags is relatively simple and only requires:

translations.原本的 Attributes 的資料結構是 `[NSAttributedStri: The original Attributes data structure is `[NSAttributedString.Key: Any?]`. If exposed directly, it is hard to control the values users input, and incorrect values may cause crashes, such as `.font: 123`.
translations.去年發表了篇「[ **TL;DR]** [自行實現 iOS NSAttribut: Last year, I published an article titled "[**TL;DR]** [Implementing iOS NSAttributedString HTML Render by Myself](../a8c2d26cc734/)," which briefly introduced using XMLParser to parse HTML and convert it into NSAttributedString.Key. The code structure and approach in the article were quite messy, as it was just a quick record of issues I encountered before and I didn't spend much time researching this topic at that time.
translations.另外也參考 W3c wiki, browser predefined color: Also refer to the W3c wiki, browser predefined color name lists corresponding color name text & color R,G,B enum: [MarkupStyleColorName.swift](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser/blob/main/Sources/ZMarkupParser/Core/MarkupStyle/MarkupStyleColorName.swift){:target="_blank"}

translations.另外搭配使用 [Visitor Pattern](../ba5773a7bfea: Additionally, combined with the use of the [Visitor Pattern](../ba5773a7bfea/), each style attribute is defined as an object Element, and different Visit strategies are used to obtain individual applied results.
translations.可參考 [SwiftRichString](https://github.com: You can refer to the implementation of [SwiftRichString](https://github.com/malcommac/SwiftRichString){:target="_blank"} and the [previous article](../a8c2d26cc734/).

translations.在 NSAttributedString 中顯示圖片，比想像中複雜很多；且沒有很: Displaying images in NSAttributedString is much more complicated than expected; there is no good implementation. translations.在 iOS 15 出現 [大量閃退](../a8c2d26cc734/) ，測試: In iOS 15, there were [many crashes](../a8c2d26cc734/). Testing found that under low battery conditions, crashes occurred 100% of the time (fixed in iOS ≥ 15.2).

When asking mid-senior level questions, they often couldn't provide a definite answer or sometimes gave incorrect ones (e.g., when asking about some regex rules, the answers were not quite accurate). So in the end, I still resorted to manually searching on Google for the correct solutions.

translations.對與我們最痛的還是閃退問題，iOS 15 發佈到 15.2 修正之前，App 始: The most painful issue for us was still the crash problem. Before the fix from iOS 15 release to 15.2, the app was dominated by this issue. According to data, from 2022/03/11 to 2022/06/08, it caused over 2.4K crashes, affecting more than 1.4K users.
translations.強烈建議使用 Markdown 做為字串渲染媒介語言，如果您的專案跟我有一樣困擾: It is highly recommended to use Markdown as the string rendering markup language. If your project faces the same issues as mine and you have no choice but to use HTML without an elegant tool to convert to NSAttributedString, please consider using this.
translations.我們只使用到 NSTextList.MarkerFormat 用來產項目清單符號: We only use NSTextList.MarkerFormat for list item symbols, not NSTextList directly.
translations.我們可以一層一層 Filter 葉節點物件。\n\n: We can filter leaf node objects layer by layer.
translations.我們會定義部分預設樣式在 [MarkupStyle](https://githu: We define some default styles in [MarkupStyle](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMarkupParser/blob/main/Sources/ZMarkupParser/Core/MarkupStyle/MarkupStyle%2BExtension.swift){:target="_blank"}. If certain Markup tags do not have styles specified externally from the code, these default styles will be used.
translations.我們要將 Normalization 後的 HTML 資料結果轉換成抽象樹，首先: We need to convert the normalized HTML data into an abstract tree. First, declare a MarkupComponent data structure to store the HTML data:
translations.找了一大圈結果都類似上方的專案 Orz，沒有巨人的肩膀可以站。\n\n: After searching everywhere, the results are all similar to the projects above Orz, no giant shoulders to stand on.
translations.排除掉使用 XMLParser 這條路之後，在 Swift 上留給我們的就只剩使: After ruling out the use of XMLParser, the only option left for us in Swift is to use Regex for matching and parsing.
translations.支援 Any to Any, e.g. HTML To Markdown, Ma: Supports Any to Any, e.g. HTML To Markdown, Markdown To HTML. Since we have the original AST tree (Markup objects), it is possible to implement conversion between any Markup formats.
translations.支援 HTML Render (to NSAttributedString) /: Supports HTML Render (to NSAttributedString) / Stripper (remove HTML Tags) / Selector features
translations.支援 Markdown 解析，因底層抽象其實不局限於 HTML；所以只要建好前面: Supports Markdown parsing because the underlying abstraction is not limited to HTML; as long as the Markdown is converted to Markup objects, Markdown parsing can be completed. Therefore, I named it ZMarkupParser instead of ZHTMLParser, hoping to support Markdown to NSAttributedString someday.
translations.支援客製化樣式指定，例如粗體要多 **粗**\n: Support custom style specification, such as making bold text even **bolder**
translations.支援彈性可擴充標籤或自訂標籤及屬性\n: Support flexible and extensible tags or custom tags and attributes
translations.支援更多 HTML Tag、Style Attribute 轉換解析\n: Support More HTML Tags and Style Attribute Conversion Parsing
translations.效能/算法的優化，雖然比原生 `NSAttributedString.Docum: Performance/algorithm optimization, although faster and more stable than the native `NSAttributedString.DocumentType.html`, still has much room for improvement. I believe the performance will never match that of XMLParser; hopefully, one day it can achieve similar performance while maintaining customization and automatic error correction.
translations.效能差：此方法是透過 WebView Core 去渲染出樣式，再切回 Main: Poor performance: This method renders styles through the WebView Core, then switches back to the Main Thread for UI display; rendering over 300 characters takes about 0.03 seconds.
translations.文章後半段有提供關於正則的附加資料，有興趣的朋友可以參考。\n\n: The latter part of the article provides additional information about regular expressions for those interested.
translations.更不要說請他寫 Code 了，除非是簡單的 Code Gen Object；不然: Not to mention asking it to write code, unless it's a simple Code Gen Object; otherwise, don't expect it to complete the entire tool architecture directly. *(At least for now, it seems Copilot might be more helpful for coding tasks.)*
translations.最一開始沒想太多，想說可以直接用正則挖出「成對」的 HTML Tag，再遞迴往裡: At first, I didn't think much and planned to directly use regex to extract "paired" HTML tags, then recursively look for HTML tags layer by layer until the end; however, this approach couldn't handle nested HTML tags or support error correction for misaligned tags. Therefore, we changed the strategy to extract "single" HTML tags, recording whether they are Start Tags, Close Tags, or Self-Closing Tags, along with other strings, to form the parsed result array.
translations.最後我們使用 Builder Pattern 讓外部 Module 可以快速構建: Finally, we use the Builder Pattern to allow external modules to quickly construct the objects needed by ZMarkupParser, while ensuring proper Access Level Control.
translations.最終來講一個最大的魔王，載入遠端圖片到 NSAttributedString。\: Finally, the biggest challenge: loading remote images into NSAttributedString.
translations.最終會得到一個 Tokenization 結果陣列。\n\n: In the end, a Tokenization result array is obtained.
translations.最終顯示結果如下：\n\n: The final display result is as follows:
translations.會吃字：例如行銷文案可能會使用 `<Congratulation!>` 會被當成: Missing text: For example, marketing copy might use `<Congratulation!>`, which will be treated as an HTML tag and removed.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有點作弊！我們無法用 Private API 🥲\n\n: A bit of cheating! We can't use Private API 🥲
translations.樣式需要可繼承，例如 `<a><b>test</b></a>` ，test 字串: Styles need to be inheritable. For example, in `test`, the style of the string "test" inherits from the link and is bold (bold + link). Directly exposing a Dictionary makes it difficult to properly manage inheritance rules.
translations.此設定是在 PR opened/reopend or push main bra: This setting runs build and test when a PR is opened/reopened or when pushing to the main branch, and finally uploads the test coverage report to codecov.
translations.此閃退問題自 iOS 12 開始就有，iOS 15 只是踩到更大的坑，但我猜 i: This crash issue has existed since iOS 12. iOS 15 just hit a bigger pitfall, but I guess the fix in iOS 15.2 is only a patch; Apple can't completely eliminate it.
translations.歷經三個多月的研究及開發，已疲憊不堪，但還是要聲明一下此做法僅為我研究後得到的可: After more than three months of research and development, I am exhausted, but I must state that this approach is just a feasible result from my study. It may not be the best solution and there might still be room for optimization. This project is more like a stepping stone, hoping to find a perfect answer for Markup Language to NSAttributedString. **Contributions are very welcome; many aspects still need the power of the community to improve.**
translations.沒有巨人的肩膀，只好自己當巨人了，於是自行開發了 HTML String to: Without the shoulders of giants, I had to become the giant myself, so I developed my own HTML String to NSAttributedString tool.
translations.流程結果如上圖\n\n: The process result is shown in the above image.
translations.為了能擴充涵蓋所有 HTMLTag/Style Attribute 所以開了一個: To support all HTMLTags and Style Attributes, a dynamic extension point was created to allow direct runtime extension of objects from code.
translations.無法客製化：例如無法指定 HTML 的粗體在 NSAttributedStrin: Cannot customize: For example, it is not possible to specify the exact boldness level of HTML bold tags in NSAttributedString.
translations.現在我們有了 HTML Tag 抽象樹結構、HTML Tag 對應的 Marku: Now that we have the HTML tag abstract tree structure and the corresponding MarkupStyle, the final step is to generate the final NSAttributedString rendering result.
translations.當 系統需要此圖片在畫面時會呼叫 `image(forBounds…` 方法，此: When the system needs this image on the screen, it will call the `image(forBounds…)` method. At this point, we start downloading the Image Data.
translations.發出 didLoad Delegate 通知，讓外部有需要時可串接\n: Send didLoad delegate notification to allow external integration when needed
translations.目前先忽略 NSTextAttachment 原生不能 reuse 釋放記憶體的: For now, ignore the native NSTextAttachment issue of not being able to reuse and release memory. Focus on implementing downloading images from remote sources, placing them into NSTextAttachment, then into NSAttributedString, and achieving automatic content updates.
translations.目前只做到 Acceptable，自己組合項目清單字串 insert 到字串前。: Currently only achieved Acceptable; manually combine list item strings and insert them at the beginning of the string.
translations.目前有應用在敝司 [pinkoi.com](https://www.pinkoi: Currently applied in our company's iOS app for [pinkoi.com](https://www.pinkoi.com){:target="_blank"}, no issues have been found. 😄
translations.直接比對最終結果是否符合預期，確保調整整合起來沒有異常。\n\n: Directly compare the final results to ensure the integration and adjustments have no issues.
translations.第二個方案是 [上篇文章](../a8c2d26cc734/) 介紹的，使用 X: The second solution is introduced in the [previous article](../a8c2d26cc734/), which uses XMLParser to parse into corresponding NSAttributedString keys and apply styles.
translations.經過 Tokenization & Normalization 資料預處理完成後: After completing the Tokenization & Normalization data preprocessing, the next step is to convert the result into an abstract syntax tree 🌲.
translations.網路上能找到的 HTML to NSAttributedString 的做法都是: The common approach for HTML to NSAttributedString found online is to use NSAttributedString's built-in options to render HTML directly. An example is shown below:
translations.繼上一步取得初步解析結果後，解析中如果發現還需要 Normalization，則: After obtaining the initial parsing result in the previous step, if normalization is still needed during parsing, this step is required to automatically fix HTML tag issues.
translations.自動分析修正 Tag 正確性(修正沒有 end 的 tag & 錯位 tag)\: Automatic Analysis and Correction of Tag Accuracy (Fixing Tags Without End Tags & Misplaced Tags)
translations.設定檔，這樣可以啟用每個 PR 發出後，自動把 CI 跑的結果 Comment: Configuration file to enable automatic commenting of CI results on each PR after it is submitted.
translations.註1\n不建議使用 HTML 做為 App 與資料間的溝通渲染媒介，因 HTML:
Note 1  
Using HTML as a communication and rendering medium between the app and data is not recommended. HTML specifications are too flexible, the app cannot support all HTML styles, and there is no official HTML conversion rendering engine.
translations.註2\niOS 14 開始可使用官方原生的 AttributedString 解:
Note 2  
Starting from iOS 14, you can use the native AttributedString to parse Markdown or integrate the apple/swift-markdown Swift Package to parse Markdown.
translations.註3\n因敝司專案龐大且已應用 HTML 做為媒介多年，所以暫時無法全面更換為:
Note 3  
Due to the large scale of our projects and the long-term use of HTML as a medium, we are currently unable to fully switch to Markdown or other markup languages.
translations.詳細介紹、安裝使用可參考此篇文章：「 [**ZMarkupParser HTML: For detailed introduction, installation, and usage, please refer to this article: 「 [**ZMarkupParser HTML String to NSAttributedString Tool**](../a5643de271e4/) 」
translations.談到 HTML 渲染最重要的就是解析的環節，以往是透過 XMLParser 將: When it comes to HTML rendering, the most important part is parsing. In the past, HTML was parsed as XML using XMLParser; however, this approach cannot handle the fact that everyday HTML is not 100% valid XML, which causes parser errors and lacks dynamic correction.
translations.轉換成抽象樹之前我們還需要…\n\n: Before converting to the abstract tree, we also need to…
translations.轉換成抽象樹可以方便我們日後的操作及擴充，例如實現 Selector 功能或是做: Converting to an abstract tree makes future operations and extensions easier, such as implementing Selector functionality or other conversions like HTML to Markdown. Similarly, if you want to add Markdown to NSAttributedString later, you only need to implement Markdown Tokenization & Normalization to achieve it.
translations.這也是我第一次開發 SPM & Cocoapods…蠻有趣的，SPM 真的方便；: This is also my first time developing with SPM & Cocoapods… quite interesting. SPM is really convenient; however, if two projects depend on the same package at the same time, opening both projects simultaneously may cause one of them to fail to find the package and fail to build...
translations.這次專案除了撰寫 Unit Test 單元測試之外還建立了 Snapshot T: In this project, besides writing Unit Tests, Snapshot Tests were also created for integration testing to facilitate comprehensive comparison of the final NSAttributedString.
translations.這邊先列一些此時此刻(2023/03/12)想到能更好的地方，之後會在 Repo: Here are some areas for improvement I thought of at this moment (2023/03/12), which I will record later in the Repo:
translations.這邊多提一下這兩個物件，因為 HTML Tag 是允許搭配從 CSS 設定樣式的: Here, let's elaborate on these two objects because HTML tags allow styling through CSS settings; accordingly, we apply the same abstraction used for HTMLTagName to the HTML Style Attribute as well.

translations.還記得上一篇文章的朋友也可以直接跳到 ZhgChgLi / ZMarkupPar: Friends who read the previous article can directly skip to the ZhgChgLi / ZMarkupParser section.
translations.關於正規表示法，每用到一次就又再精進一次；這次實際沒用到太多，但是因為本來想用一: Regarding regular expressions, each time I use them, I improve my skills further; this time I didn't use them much, but since I originally wanted to use one regex to extract paired HTML tags, I studied how to write it more carefully.
translations.關於項目清單的實現紀錄。\n\n: Implementation notes on the project list.
translations.類似 Render，但純粹找到 RawStringMarkup 後返回內容。\n: Similar to Render, but simply returns the content after finding RawStringMarkup.
translations.類似 清單項目的實現，但是是表格。\n\n: Similar to the implementation of list items, but for tables.
